commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: And Moses went up to God. Moses went up to Mount Sinai, where God spoke to him.

commentaries.author: Gregory the Theologian
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Moses went up unto God, and the LORD called unto him out of the mountain, saying, Thus shall you say to the house of Jacob, and tell the children of Israel; Gregory the Theologian Now when I go up eagerly into the mount—or, to use a truer expression, when I both eagerly long and at the same time am afraid (the one through my hope and the other through my weakness), to enter within the cloud and hold converse with God, for so God commands: If any be an Aaron, let him go up with me, and let him stand near, being ready, if it must be so, to remain outside the cloud.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: And Moses went up to God: Moses went up to mount Sinai, where God spoke to him.
